# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-test-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Build project
      run: npm run build

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

    - name: Deploy to production
      uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
      with:
        host: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
        username: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USERNAME }}
        key: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_KEY }}
        script: |
          cd /path/to/deploy/directory
          npm install --production
          pm2 restart app
